Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Temporary Restraining Order; Preliminary Injunction And Show Cause; Memo Of P & A And Dec
Off Calendar Jun-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF RUCHELL MAGEE'S MOTION For Temporary Restraining Order; Preliminary Injunction And Show Cause IS Off calendar. Judge Karnow dismissed this action on April 20, 2012. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Mtn To Dismiss
Off Calendar May-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT K. COMAITES' MOTION TO DISMISS THE ACTION FOR FAILURE TO FURNISH SECURITY UNDER CCP 391.4.
No appearances. This motion is off calendar per withdrawal of motion by the moving party filed April 26, 2012. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2012 Continued To Jun-22-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Ruchell Magee'S Motion For Hearing On Imminent Endagerment Of Life
Off Calendar Apr-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF RUCHELL MAGEE'S MOTION FOR HEARING ON IMMINENT ENDAGERMENT OF LIFE.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: off calendar. Judge Karnow dismissed this action because plaintiff failed to post a security in compliance with the order entered on March 16, 2012. The order of dismissal was entered on April 20, 2012. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Temporary Restraining Order; Preliminary Injunction And Show Cause; Memo Of P & A And Dec
Off Calendar Apr-16-2012 Continued To Jun-11-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Neah Huynh, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, Tel. 415.703.5720, appearing for Defendant and opposing party.
No other appearance on this matter.

The matter was discussed. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RUCHELL MAGEE'S Motion For Temporary Restraining Order; Preliminary Injunction And Show Cause is Continued to June 11, 2012 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 302 to be heard by Judge McBride for hearing pending (1) service of petitioner's papers and (2) posting of bond. Respondent to serve the order no later than April 25, 2012. Petitioner is ordered to serve papers by May 11, 2012. Opposition due May 22, 2012. Reply, if any, is due June 1, 2012. Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Hearing On Imminent Endangerment Of Life; Dec; Memo Of P & A
Off Calendar Apr-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF RUCHELL MAGEE's Motion For Hearing On Imminent Endangerment Of Life is Continued on court's own motion to be heard at 9:30 A.M. on April 23, 2012. Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Declare Pltf Magee A Vexatious Litigant, Require Him To Furnish Security And Enter A Pre-Filing Order; Memo Of P & A; Req. For Judicial Ntc And Pos
Off Calendar Mar-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT K. COMAITES' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Declare Plaintiff Magee A Vexatious Litigant, Require Him To Furnish Security And Enter A Pre-Filing Order - Judge Kahn has construed the statement of disqualification filed by plaintiff as a peremptory challenge to him per Code of Civil Procedure 170.6 and grants the challenge. The matter has been transferred to Judge Curtis E. A. Karnow and shall be heard in department 608 at the previously noticed date and time. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
